items.name: Midnight Gothic Blouse [PBR]
items.description:
🖤 Elegance wrapped in mystery. 🖤
The Midnight Gothic Blouse features a dark, corset-inspired design with dramatic flowing sleeves and lace-up detailing. Its distressed textures and intricate cuts make it perfect for gothic, fantasy, and roleplay avatars seeking a hauntingly beautiful style.

💡 Why You’ll Love It

Intricate corset-style design with button and lace-up details

Flowing tattered sleeves for a dramatic gothic effect

Dark, moody textures that bring mystery and allure

Perfect for fantasy, gothic, vampire, or roleplay outfits

🔍 Keywords: gothic, blouse, corset, fantasy, vampire, witch, black lace, medieval, dark fashion, elegant

🌙 Step into the night with timeless gothic grace.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.

items.name: Raptor Strike (F-22A)(Shoulder)
items.description:
For the rich ones.....

The Lockheed Martin F-22A "Raptor" is an advanced, 5th-generation offensive counter-air fighter that was developed during the 1980s to replace the McDonnell Douglas F-15 Eagle while the Soviet MiG-29 and Su-27 entered service. The F-22A’s APG-77(v)1 takes existing technology from the F-35’s APG-81 while adding Air-Ground capability. One of its main advantages comes from the Pratt and Whitney F119 engines that allow it to fly around 10k feet higher than average fighters and supercruise at unmatched speeds. The F-22A Block 20 trainers are planned to be retired in 2024, with the Blocks 30-40s will retire ~ 2030. While the Raptor is an incredible fighter, it suffers from limited datalink transmission capability, the lack of a helmet-mounted display system, and the lack of infrared detection systems. These flaws hamper its capabilities in engaging current Very Low Observable threats and future ones. (by macmacmacmoc2)
